title: Turkish Lentil Pilaf
description: A hearty and flavorful vegan pilaf made with lentils, savory spices, and a hint of Turkish flair.

ingredients.name: Turkish Pilaf Rice
ingredients.notes: preferably with a low sodium content

instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Add the cumin and paprika and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the lentils, rice, salt, and water to the saucepan.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and cover.
Simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until the lentils and rice are tender.
Fluff with a fork and serve hot.
Optional: add a squeeze of lemon juice and a sprinkle of chopped fresh parsley for added flavor.
Serve warm, garnished with a sprinkle of paprika if desired.
